case_title: DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY VS. OSCAR TICAS et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE DONDERO; CLERKS: D. BOFFI & V. MU; REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE, #3321 (206) MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2004 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-21-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 604, DAVID BALLATI.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-21-2004 IN DEPT. 604 - COURT TRIAL HELD. COURT GRANTS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 11,622.24, PRINCIPLE; INTEREST ACCRUING FROM JUNE 6, 2003 TO DATE, AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM, $1,213.17. COSTS ARE TO BE DETERMINED BY COSTS MEMORANDUM. ATTORNEY'S FEES ARE NOT AWARDED. COUNEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT FOR SIGNATURE A JUDGMENT, APPROVED ACCORDING TO FORM. JUDGE: D. BALLATI; CLERK: R. GOULDING; REPORTER: S. LEE, CSR # 4280.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TICAS, OSCAR AN INDIVIDUAL $11,622.24 PRINCIPAL, $1,213.17 INTEREST, $317.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,152.91, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
